demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a caregiver who is present and assisting

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I cannot stop dry heaving, every time I sip water it comes straight back up, and I have absolutely no energy left. I had my chemo yesterday and I've been throwing up all night.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The vomiting hasn't stopped since yesterday afternoon and I can't keep anything down, not even the anti-sickness tablets. My carer is worried and I feel too weak to stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 4 hours after my chemo session yesterday
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 12 hours of non-stop vomiting overnight
symptom_narrative.character: constant dry heaving and bringing up whatever I try to sip; nothing stays down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been after a treatment; I'm completely wiped out and can't get out of bed
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on within hours of the treatment and has been continuous since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; even small sips come straight back up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the smell of food makes it worse, and sitting up or trying to stand makes me heave and feel faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no appetite at all, food tastes strange, feel very dizzy and weak when I try to stand, and I've barely passed any urine
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had some sickness after previous cycles but never this bad and never for this long
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, need my carer for everything, too weak and dizzy to walk to the bathroom safely

past_medical_history.how_managed: under an oncology team, currently mid-way through my treatment cycles

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: has a caregiver at home helping full-time at the moment; the caregiver made the call and is very distressed

objective_data_offered.value: 36.5 degrees on our home thermometer, so no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; a normal reading does not exclude infection later

objective_data_offered.value: about 54 kg on the home scales, and I've lost roughly 8 percent of my weight over the last couple of months
looks very thin and drained with dry, cracked lips; sunken appearance around the temples and shoulders
carer reports she is bedbound, gets very dizzy and nearly falls when she tries to stand, and there are several vomit bowls at the bedside; she has hardly passed any urine
